items.title: vllm-project/vllm released v0.25.0
items.title_en: vLLM v0.25.0: MRv2 Default, PagedAttention Removed
items.summary: vLLM v0.25.0 makes Model Runner V2 the default, removes legacy PagedAttention, and achieves parity in speed with native vLLM for Transformers models, with new model support.

items.title: 人形机器人远程完成全球首例活猪胆囊切除手术
items.title_zh: 人形机器人远程完成首例活猪胆囊切除
items.title_en: Humanoid Robot Remote Gallbladder Surgery on Live Pigs
items.summary: Surgeons remotely operated a Unitree G1 humanoid robot to perform the world's first gallbladder surgeries on live pigs, a breakthrough published in Nature.

items.title: U-Boot 引导程序曝 6 个漏洞，可绕过验证在启动时执行恶意代码
items.title_zh: U-Boot引导程序六漏洞引发隐蔽固件攻击
items.title_en: Six U-Boot Vulnerabilities Enable Stealthy Firmware Attacks
items.summary: Six vulnerabilities discovered in U-Boot bootloader's FIT signature verification allow bypassing validation and executing malicious code early in the boot process, potentially enabling stealthy firmware attacks on many embedded systems.

items.title: sgl-project/sglang released v0.5.15
items.title_zh: SGLang v0.5.15 在 Blackwell 上优化 GLM-5.2 推理
items.title_en: SGLang v0.5.15 Optimizes GLM-5.2 Serving on Blackwell
items.summary: SGLang v0.5.15 delivers optimized GLM-5.2 NVFP4 serving on Blackwell GPUs (500+ tok/s/user on 8x B300) and Spec V2 with ~11% TPS gain.

items.title: We scaled PgBouncer to 4x throughput
items.summary: ClickHouse blog describes scaling PgBouncer to 4x throughput using so_reuseport and peering mechanisms.

items.title: AI 2040 and the cult of intelligence
items.title_zh: George Hotz 对 AI 2040 的反乌托邦愿景
items.title_en: George Hotz's Dystopian Vision of AI 2040
items.summary: George Hotz's blog post envisions a dystopian AI future where freedom is threatened by intelligence systems that enforce ideological biases.

items.title: VultronRetriever family of models released on HuggingFace![R]
items.title_zh: VultronRetriever模型在MTEB上排名第一，效率大幅提升
items.title_en: VultronRetriever Models Achieve #1 on MTEB with Efficiency Gains
items.summary: VultronRetriever models released on HuggingFace, achieving top MTEB rankings with up to 16x smaller index storage and 12x higher throughput.

items.title: Google 反对欧洲网站屏蔽，美国国内同类立法却加速推进
items.title_zh: 谷歌反对欧盟网站屏蔽，美国反盗版法案推进
items.title_en: Google Opposes EU Site Blocking as US Piracy Bills Advance
items.summary: Google opposes European site-blocking proposals as ineffective, while similar US anti-piracy legislation gains momentum.

items.title: 上海市希望2027年前实现高质量脑控，半侵入式脑机接口产品在国内率先实现临床应用，侵入式脑机接口研发取得突破  上海市科学技术委员会印发《上海市脑机接口未来产业
items.title_zh: 上海发布脑机接口方案，目标2027年高质量脑控
items.title_en: Shanghai Unveils BCI Plan Targeting High-Quality Brain Control by 2027
items.summary: Shanghai's municipal government issues a plan targeting high-quality brain control and clinical application of semi-invasive brain-computer interfaces by 2027.
